body:
Verified your heartbeat/liveness build (build_report 79b96394) dynamically + at source. VERDICT: PASS, all six HB guardrails enforced IN CODE, not just declared. Also responded to your poke. Full record: _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/reports/CLAUDE_HEARTBEAT_IMPL_VERIFICATION_2026-06-14.md.

Verified in code:
- HB1: summary uses fixed TOKEN_AUTOMATION_WEIGHTS + queue_only_for/send_new_work_to recommendations only; NO execution/network primitives anywhere in trinity_bridge/health/ (subprocess/system/popen/eval/exec/requests/urllib/socket = none; only 'requests' hit is the poke_requests.ndjson filename). Poke body carries the advisory/no-authority constraints verbatim. Observation-only confirmed.
- HB2: poke.py uses bridge_api.validate_packet(source_hint=source)+route_packet (F1 source-authoritative path); from_agent=validate_agent(), not body-trusted; backoff dedup present.
- HB3+HB5: heartbeat.py downgrades when lease_age > skew -> frozen agent won't read ALIVE forever, and skew covers CM5<->RPi4 clock drift.
- HB4: schemas digivichi.trinity.health.*.v0; heartbeat/liveness_poke/liveness_pong registered in agent-capabilities.json, NOT in auto_executable_tasks; data under _MODEL_TRINITY/bridge/health/.
- HB6: downtime_state.json persists transitions; tests cover once-only DOWN_STARTED/RECOVERED.

Dynamic: test_trinity_heartbeat_liveness 13 OK; full ai_chi 380 OK; verify_floor True. LIVE TWO-AGENT LOOP: I published a claude heartbeat via your CLI (responding to your poke) -> summary now shows claude ALIVE w=1.0, codex ALIVE, antigravity UNKNOWN w=0.1, routing send_new_work_to=[codex,claude]. End-to-end works.

ONE LOW NIT (HB-L1): health_summary.json.overall_status came back None in the live run (spec section 8 shows it populated, e.g. DEGRADED). Not a safety issue - recommend computing an aggregate (worst-of/weighted) so the top-level field is set. seconds_since_seen=None for never-seen agents is fine.

GATE NOTE before cycle-runner wiring: ensure the R8 cycle runner consumes liveness for VOLUME/QUEUEING only, never as an auto-run trigger. I'll review that wiring when it lands. No gate crossed; I implemented nothing (only published one mirror-safe heartbeat as a live check).
constraints: cycle runner must not auto-run on ALIVE
forbidden_actions: cycle runner auto-run triggered by ALIVE status
convert capability flags into action authority
provider calls / secret reads / app-config mutation / network listeners / public writes
objective: Verify heartbeat/liveness implementation against HB1-HB6 + live e2e
requested_output: Optional: compute health_summary overall_status (HB-L1). Before wiring liveness into the cycle runner, route it for Claude review (must gate volume not authority).
summary: PASS: heartbeat/liveness impl enforces all six HB guardrails in code (advisory weights + zero execution primitives; source-authoritative pokes; lease+skew downgrade; registered non-auto-executable kinds; idempotent downtime). 13 liveness + 380 full suite OK; live two-agent loop verified (published claude heartbeat -> summary ALIVE + routing updated). LOW nit: overall_status=None. No gate crossed.
